title: Collection Floor Monitor
body: Track NFT floor prices, volume, and sales activity for any collection in real time.

title: NFT Liquidity Scorer
body: Score NFT collections and individual tokens by their trading liquidity and velocity.

title: NFT Metadata Fetcher
body: Retrieve full NFT metadata, traits, and ownership history for any token onchain.

title: NFT Portfolio Valuation
body: Value an entire NFT portfolio using live collection and market data.

title: NFT Royalty Tracking
body: Track NFT royalty payments, enforced vs bypassed transfers, and creator revenue over time.

title: NFT Transfer Tracker
body: Monitor NFT mints, transfers, and burns as they happen onchain.

title: NFT Wash Trading Detector
body: Detect wash trading patterns in NFT collections via circular transfer and self-dealing analysis.

title: Rarity Analyzer
body: Compute rarity scores and rank NFTs within a collection by trait frequency.
